action.reasoning: Observation: Env setup works. obs dims vary per task (151-173), action is 61-dim everywhere. Reward signals reasonable. Analysis: With 30 iter and 10h budget, per-task SAC is best for sample efficiency. Need to plan: 10 tasks × time per task. Let me first build the train+predict pipeline with one task (walk) and minimal training, submit eval to measure pipeline. Decision: Build minimal SAC training on h1hand-walk-v0 with ~50k steps, plus predict.py that handles all 10 tasks (random fallback for untrained tasks). Submit eval to measure timing.

Gym has been unmaintained since 2022 and does not support NumPy 2.0 amongst other critical functionality.
Please upgrade to Gymnasium, the maintained drop-in replacement of Gym, or contact the authors of your software and request that they upgrade.
Users of this version of Gym should be able to simply replace 'import gym' with 'import gymnasium as gym' in the vast majority of cases.
See the migration guide at https://gymnasium.farama.org/introduction/migration_guide/ for additional information.
